creator: mah@jump-ing.de
text:
Am 04.09.2007 um 13:33 schrieb Kris Kennaway:

> I disagree that this is a bug.

The port looks for /usr/local/bin/libtool and if it doesn't find it,  
it builds /usr/bin/libtool instead of what it's looking for. After  
doing so, it looks again in /usr/local/bin and fails again, giving  
up. In which situation does this make sense?

> In almost all cases you need to be setting LOCALBASE to direct the  
> ports collection about where to look for other ports.

In the secnario described, there is no other port to look for. It's a  
fresh, clean installation, zero ports installed. The bug is about  
_building_ dependencies, not _finding_ them.


Cheers,
Markus
